case_title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. WYSINGER, BANISHA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ENT- ORIGINAL WRITTEN CONTRACT/LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION
